name: minion-fetch
description: Cross-OS URL fetcher for AI agents with a composable plugin architecture

scripts.clean: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); for (const f of ['dist/minion-fetch.js','dist/agent-fetch.js','dist/agent-fetch.mjs']) { try { fs.unlinkSync(f); } catch {} }"
scripts.prepack: bun run build && cp package.json package.json.bak && npm pkg delete dependencies devDependencies
